headlines.headline: Sources: Lakers' Reaves intends to sign 4-year, $185M extension

headlines.headline: Blackhawks acquire Bowen Byram in trade with Sabres
headlines.description: The Blackhawks acquired defenseman Bowen Byram and forward Jordan Greenway in a trade with the Sabres on Tuesday, in exchange for the Nos. 4 and 45 picks in Friday's NHL draft, along with defenseman Louis Crevier.

headlines.headline: Caps add Kyrou, send McMichael, Gastrin, No. 16 pick to Blues
headlines.description: The Capitals acquired veteran winger Jordan Kyrou from the Blues in exchange for Connor McMichael, Milton Gastrin and the No. 16 pick in Friday's NHL draft.
